titles.title: Redeemed By The Blood of The Lamb

authors.author: überliefert
Volksweise
Ich bin erlöst durch des Lammes Blut

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am redeemed by the blood of the lamb I am redeemed and I know I am I am redeemed by the blood of the lamb Saved from sin and I know I am All my sins are taken away, praise the Lord.
